title: PhD in Political Economy of Climate Change Adaptation Policies
description: PhD position within the NCCR CLIM+ initiative, investigating the political economy of climate change adaptation policies. Research focuses on how political processes, institutional structures, and extreme events shape adaptation policy design. Mixed-method approach combining qualitative policy analysis with quantitative causal inference.

title: PhD in Environmental Science & Policy
stipend: Full tuition + living allowance + health insurance
description: Fully funded 4-year PhD programme at CEU Vienna covering Climate, Energy & Resource Management (CERM) and Advanced Methods & Skills (AMS). Strong quantitative/GIS methods track. English-only, international students welcome. Next cycle applications open ~September 2026.

title: MRes + PhD in Economics / Business Data Science
description: Elite 2-year MRes followed by PhD at Tinbergen Institute, a collaboration between Erasmus University Rotterdam, University of Amsterdam, and VU Amsterdam. Tracks in Economics and Business Data Science. One of Europe's top economics graduate schools.

title: PhD in Computer Science / Regional Science & Economic Geography
description: 38 fully funded PhD scholarships across 4 tracks including Computer Science (AI/ML focus) and Regional Science & Economic Geography. Small elite research institute in L'Aquila, Italy. 100% fully funded, interdisciplinary environment. Watch for 2026/2027 cycle.

title: PhD in Economics, Applied Data Science & Decision Sciences (EADS)
university: IMT School for Advanced Studies Lucca
description: Fully funded PhD in Economics, Applied Data Science and Decision Sciences at IMT Lucca. Covers network analysis, behavioral economics, quantitative methods. 6 fully funded places, 3-4 year program. English only, international students welcome. Next cycle ~2027.

title: PhD in NLP & LLM Safety
description: Fully funded PhD positions at CopeNLU Lab under Prof. Isabelle Augenstein (top NLP researcher). Focus on large language model safety, explainable AI, and NLP. Funded by Danish Independent Research Fund. Positions open periodically — watch the lab website.

title: PhD Fellowships in Data Science
description: Annual PhD fellowship program from the Danish Data Science Academy covering data science applications across multiple disciplines. Multiple universities. Strong interdisciplinary focus. Excellent stipend by European standards.

title: PhD in Environmental Science (Australian RTP Scholarship)
description: Fully funded PhD under the Australian Government Research Training Program (RTP) scholarship. Covers tuition fees + living stipend. Environmental science focus with dual-degree options. Open to international students.
